import { ref, computed, watch, mergeProps, useSSRContext } from 'vue';
import { ssrRenderAttrs, ssrRenderList, ssrRenderAttr, ssrIncludeBooleanAttr, ssrLooseContain, ssrLooseEqual, ssrInterpolate } from 'vue/server-renderer';
import { a as _export_sfc, u as useCookie } from './server.mjs';
import '../_/nitro.mjs';
import 'node:http';
import 'node:https';
import 'node:events';
import 'node:buffer';
import 'node:fs';
import 'node:path';
import 'node:crypto';
import 'node:url';
import '../routes/renderer.mjs';
import 'vue-bundle-renderer/runtime';
import 'unhead/server';
import 'devalue';
import 'unhead/utils';
import 'vue-router';

const _sfc_main = {
  __name: "buku-induk",
  __ssrInlineRender: true,
  setup(__props) {
    const token = useCookie("auth_token");
    const sekolah = ref(null);
    const mapelStruktur = ref([]);
    const tahunAjarans = ref([]);
    ref(null);
    const kurikulums = ref([]);
    const kelasList = ref([]);
    const selectedTahunAjaranId = ref("");
    const selectedKurikulumId = ref("");
    const selectedKelasId = ref("");
    const students = ref([]);
    const currentStudentIndex = ref(0);
    const isLoadingBiodata = ref(false);
    const nilaiSiswa = ref({
});
    const isLoadingNilai = ref(false);
    const filteredKelasList = computed(() =>
 {
      return kelasList.value.filter(
        (k) =>
 k.kurikulum_id === selectedKurikulumId.value && k.tahun_ajaran_id === selectedTahunAjaranId.value
      );
    
});
    const selectedTahunAjaran = computed(() =>
 {
      return tahunAjarans.value.find((t) =>
 t.id === selectedTahunAjaranId.value);
    
});
    const currentStudent = computed(() =>
 {
      if (students.value.length === 0) return null;
      return students.value[currentStudentIndex.value];
    
});
    const currentKelas = computed(() =>
 {
      return kelasList.value.find((k) =>
 k.id === selectedKelasId.value);
    
});
    const getTahunAjaranNaik = (tahunStr, addYears) =>
 {
      if (!tahunStr) return "-";
      const parts = tahunStr.split("/");
      if (parts.length === 2) {
        return `${parseInt(parts[0]) + addYears}/${parseInt(parts[1]) + addYears}`;
      }
      return tahunStr;
    };
    const fetchNilaiSiswa = async () =>
 {
      if (!currentStudent.value) return;
      isLoadingNilai.value = true;
      try {
        const res = await $fetch(`https://api.erapor.yatindosystem.net/api/admin/buku-induk/siswa/${currentStudent.value.id}/nilai`, {
          headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token.value}` }
        
});
        if (res.success) {
          nilaiSiswa.value = res.nilai;
        }
      } catch (e) {
        console.error(e);
        nilaiSiswa.value = {};
      } finally {
        isLoadingNilai.value = false;
      }
    };
    watch(currentStudent, () =>
 {
      if (currentStudent.value) {
        fetchNilaiSiswa();
      } else {
        nilaiSiswa.value = {};
      }
    
});
    return (_ctx, _push, _parent, _attrs) =>
 {
      
_push(`
<div${ssrRenderAttrs(mergeProps({ class: "space-y-5 animate-fadeIn" }, _attrs))} data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="bg-white p-5 rounded-2xl shadow-sm mb-6 flex flex-col gap-4" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="flex flex-col md:flex-row justify-between items-start md:items-center gap-4" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div data-v-5b5e4c74>

<h2 class="text-xl font-extrabold text-slate-800" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Buku Induk Siswa
</h2>

<p class="text-sm text-slate-500 font-medium mt-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Cetak Keterangan Tentang Diri Siswa
</p>

</div>

<div class="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="flex flex-col" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<label class="text-[10px] text-slate-500 uppercase font-black mb-1 ml-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Tahun Ajaran
</label>

<select class="bg-slate-50 text-slate-800 text-sm font-bold rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 transition-shadow min-w-[140px] cursor-pointer border border-slate-100 hover:border-emerald-200" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<!--[-->
`);
      ssrRenderList(tahunAjarans.value, (ta) =>
 {
        
_push(`
<option${ssrRenderAttr("value", ta.id)} data-v-5b5e4c74${ssrIncludeBooleanAttr(Array.isArray(selectedTahunAjaranId.value) ? ssrLooseContain(selectedTahunAjaranId.value, ta.id) : ssrLooseEqual(selectedTahunAjaranId.value, ta.id)) ? " selected" : ""}>
${ssrInterpolate(ta.tahun)}
</option>
`);
      
});
      
_push(`
<!--]-->

</select>

</div>

<div class="flex flex-col" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<label class="text-[10px] text-slate-500 uppercase font-black mb-1 ml-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Kurikulum
</label>

<select class="bg-slate-50 text-slate-800 text-sm font-bold rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 transition-shadow min-w-[160px] cursor-pointer border border-slate-100 hover:border-emerald-200" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<!--[-->
`);
      ssrRenderList(kurikulums.value, (kurikulum) =>
 {
        
_push(`
<option${ssrRenderAttr("value", kurikulum.id)} data-v-5b5e4c74${ssrIncludeBooleanAttr(Array.isArray(selectedKurikulumId.value) ? ssrLooseContain(selectedKurikulumId.value, kurikulum.id) : ssrLooseEqual(selectedKurikulumId.value, kurikulum.id)) ? " selected" : ""}>
${ssrInterpolate(kurikulum.nama_kurikulum)}
</option>
`);
      
});
      
_push(`
<!--]-->

</select>

</div>

<div class="flex flex-col" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<label class="text-[10px] text-slate-500 uppercase font-black mb-1 ml-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Kelas
</label>

<select class="bg-slate-50 text-slate-800 text-sm font-bold rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-500 transition-shadow min-w-[120px] cursor-pointer border border-slate-100 hover:border-emerald-200" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<!--[-->
`);
      ssrRenderList(filteredKelasList.value, (kelas) =>
 {
        
_push(`
<option${ssrRenderAttr("value", kelas.id)} data-v-5b5e4c74${ssrIncludeBooleanAttr(Array.isArray(selectedKelasId.value) ? ssrLooseContain(selectedKelasId.value, kelas.id) : ssrLooseEqual(selectedKelasId.value, kelas.id)) ? " selected" : ""}>
${ssrInterpolate(kelas.tingkat)} ${ssrInterpolate(kelas.nama_kelas)}
</option>
`);
      
});
      
_push(`
<!--]-->
`);
      if (filteredKelasList.value.length === 0) {
        
_push(`
<option value="" data-v-5b5e4c74${ssrIncludeBooleanAttr(Array.isArray(selectedKelasId.value) ? ssrLooseContain(selectedKelasId.value, "") : ssrLooseEqual(selectedKelasId.value, "")) ? " selected" : ""}>
Pilih Kelas
</option>
`);
      } else {
        
_push(`
<!---->
`);
      }
      
_push(`
</select>

</div>

<div class="flex flex-col justify-end h-full pt-4" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<button${ssrIncludeBooleanAttr(!currentStudent.value || isLoadingBiodata.value) ? " disabled" : ""} class="bg-emerald-500 text-white text-sm font-bold rounded-xl px-5 py-2.5 outline-none hover:bg-emerald-600 transition-colors disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed flex items-center gap-2 border border-emerald-600 shadow-sm" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="h-4 w-4" viewBox="0 0 20 20" fill="currentColor" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<path fill-rule="evenodd" d="M5 4v3H4a2 2 0 00-2 2v3a2 2 0 002 2h1v2a2 2 0 002 2h6a2 2 0 002-2v-2h1a2 2 0 002-2V9a2 2 0 00-2-2h-1V4a2 2 0 00-2-2H7a2 2 0 00-2 2zm8 0H7v3h6V4zm0 8H7v4h6v-4z" clip-rule="evenodd" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</path>

</svg>
 Cetak A0 
</button>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex flex-col w-full mt-2" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<label class="text-[10px] text-slate-500 uppercase font-black mb-1 text-center" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Navigasi Siswa
</label>

<div class="flex items-center justify-between bg-slate-800 rounded-xl p-1.5 shadow-md w-full" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<button${ssrIncludeBooleanAttr(currentStudentIndex.value 
<= 0 || isLoadingBiodata.value) ? " disabled" : ""} class="p-2 px-6 bg-slate-700 rounded-lg text-white hover:bg-emerald-500 transition-colors disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="h-4 w-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2.5" d="M15 19l-7-7 7-7" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</path>

</svg>

</button>

<div class="flex-1 px-3 text-center overflow-hidden" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<p class="text-[9px] text-slate-300 uppercase font-bold tracking-wider mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Siswa ${ssrInterpolate(students.value.length >
 0 ? currentStudentIndex.value + 1 + " dari " + students.value.length : "-")}
</p>

<p class="font-bold text-white text-sm truncate" data-v-5b5e4c74>
${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value ? currentStudent.value.nama_lengkap : isLoadingBiodata.value ? "Memuat..." : "Kosong")}
</p>

</div>

<button${ssrIncludeBooleanAttr(currentStudentIndex.value >
= students.value.length - 1 || isLoadingBiodata.value) ? " disabled" : ""} class="p-2 px-6 bg-slate-700 rounded-lg text-white hover:bg-emerald-500 transition-colors disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" class="h-4 w-4" fill="none" viewBox="0 0 24 24" stroke="currentColor" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<path stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="2.5" d="M9 5l7 7-7 7" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</path>

</svg>

</button>

</div>

</div>

</div>
`);
      if (isLoadingBiodata.value) {
        
_push(`
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-20 bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="animate-spin rounded-full h-12 w-12 border-b-2 border-emerald-500 mb-4" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

<p class="text-slate-500 font-medium" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Memuat data buku induk...
</p>

</div>
`);
      } else if (!currentStudent.value && !isLoadingBiodata.value) {
        
_push(`
<div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center py-20 bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm text-slate-500" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="text-4xl mb-4" data-v-5b5e4c74>
📭
</div>

<p class="font-medium" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Tidak ada data siswa di kelas ini.
</p>

</div>
`);
      } else {
        
_push(`
<div class="w-full bg-white rounded-2xl shadow-sm overflow-hidden no-print-bg" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="overflow-x-auto p-4 md:p-8 custom-scrollbar" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div id="printable-area" class="min-w-[1400px] bg-white border border-slate-300 p-8 shadow-sm print-container" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="relative w-full flex justify-between items-start mb-6" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-1/4" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

<div class="w-1/2 text-center uppercase tracking-wide" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<h2 class="text-[15px] font-bold font-serif text-black leading-tight" data-v-5b5e4c74>
HASIL PRESTASI BELAJAR SISWA ${ssrInterpolate(sekolah.value?.nama_sekolah || "NAMA SEKOLAH")}
</h2>

<p class="text-[10px] font-serif text-black mt-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
${ssrInterpolate(sekolah.value?.alamat || "Alamat Sekolah")} Telp ${ssrInterpolate(sekolah.value?.telepon || "-")}
</p>

</div>

<div class="w-1/4 flex flex-col justify-end text-[9px] font-sans text-black gap-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="flex" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-32" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Bidang Studi Keahlian
</div>

<div data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentKelas.value?.kejuruan?.program?.bidang?.nama_bidang || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-32" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Program Studi Keahlian
</div>

<div data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentKelas.value?.kejuruan?.program?.nama_program || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-32" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Kompetensi Keahlian
</div>

<div data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentKelas.value?.kejuruan?.nama_konsentrasi || "-")}
</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="mb-2" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<span class="font-bold text-[10px] font-sans text-black underline tracking-wide" data-v-5b5e4c74>
KETERANGAN TENTANG DIRI SISWA
</span>

</div>

<div class="flex w-full items-stretch" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-[22%] pr-6 text-[9px] text-black font-sans shrink-0 leading-tight" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="flex mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-32" data-v-5b5e4c74>
NISN
</div>

<div data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.nisn || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-3" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-32" data-v-5b5e4c74>
NIS
</div>

<div data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.nis || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>
1
</div>

<div class="w-28" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Nama Siswa
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: 
<span class="uppercase" data-v-5b5e4c74>
${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.nama_lengkap || "-")}
</span>

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>
2
</div>

<div class="w-28" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Jenis Kelamin
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.jenis_kelamin || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>
3
</div>

<div class="w-28" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Tempat/Tgl Lahir
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.tempat_lahir || "-")}, ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.tanggal_lahir || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>
4
</div>

<div class="w-28" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Warga Negara
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.warga_negara || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>
5
</div>

<div class="w-28" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Agama
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.agama || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5 items-start" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>
6
</div>

<div class="w-28 shrink-0" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Alamat
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.alamat || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-3" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

<div class="w-28" data-v-5b5e4c74>
No. Telpon
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.no_hp || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>
7
</div>

<div class="w-28" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Nama Orang Tua
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>
a
</div>

<div class="w-24" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Nama Ayah
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.nama_ayah || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-10" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

<div class="w-24" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Tempat/Tgl Lahir
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.ttl_ayah || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-10" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

<div class="w-24" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Pekerjaan
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.pekerjaan_ayah || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-3 items-start" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-10" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

<div class="w-24 shrink-0" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Alamat Rumah
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.alamat || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>
b
</div>

<div class="w-24" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Nama Ibu
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.nama_ibu || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-10" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

<div class="w-24" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Tempat/Tgl Lahir
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.ttl_ibu || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-10" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

<div class="w-24" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Pekerjaan
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.pekerjaan_ibu || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-3 items-start" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-10" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

<div class="w-24 shrink-0" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Alamat Rumah
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.alamat || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>
c
</div>

<div class="w-24" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Nama Wali
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.nama_wali || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-10" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

<div class="w-24" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Pekerjaan
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.pekerjaan_wali || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-3 items-start" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-10" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

<div class="w-24 shrink-0" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Alamat Rumah
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.alamat_wali || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>
8
</div>

<div class="w-28" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Diterima Menjadi Siswa
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

<div class="w-28" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Tanggal
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.tanggal_masuk || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5 items-start" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

<div class="w-28 shrink-0" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Asal sekolah
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.asal_sekolah || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5 items-start" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

<div class="w-28 shrink-0" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Alamat Sekolah
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.alamat_sekolah_asal || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

<div class="w-28" data-v-5b5e4c74>
No. STTB
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.no_sttb_smp || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-3" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

<div class="w-28" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Tgl. STTB
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.tgl_sttb_smp || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>
9
</div>

<div class="w-28" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Meninggalkan Sekolah
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

<div class="w-28" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Tanggal
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.tanggal_keluar || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-3 items-start" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

<div class="w-28 shrink-0" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Alasan
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.alasan_keluar || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>
10
</div>

<div class="w-28" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Tamat Sekolah
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

<div class="w-28" data-v-5b5e4c74>
No. STTB
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.no_sttb_smk || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-3" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

</div>

<div class="w-28" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Tgl. STTB
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.tgl_sttb_smk || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>
11
</div>

<div class="w-28" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Tempat PKL
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.tempat_pkl || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-0.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>
12
</div>

<div class="w-28" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Waktu PKL
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.tgl_mulai_pkl || "-")} s/d ${ssrInterpolate(currentStudent.value.tgl_selesai_pkl || "-")}
</div>

</div>

<div class="flex mb-3" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="w-5" data-v-5b5e4c74>
13
</div>

<div class="w-28" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Keterangan Lain-lain
</div>

<div class="flex-1" data-v-5b5e4c74>
: -
</div>

</div>

</div>

<div class="w-[78%] border-2 border-slate-800 bg-white relative" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<div class="flex-1 p-2 flex flex-col min-h-[800px]" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<table class="w-full border-collapse border border-black text-[10px] text-black" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<thead data-v-5b5e4c74>

<tr class="bg-gray-100 text-center font-bold" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<th rowspan="2" class="border border-black p-1.5 w-1/3" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Mata Pelajaran
</th>

<th colspan="2" class="border border-black p-1.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Tingkat X : ${ssrInterpolate(selectedTahunAjaran.value?.tahun || "-")}
</th>

<th colspan="2" class="border border-black p-1.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Tingkat XI : ${ssrInterpolate(getTahunAjaranNaik(selectedTahunAjaran.value?.tahun, 1))}
</th>

<th colspan="2" class="border border-black p-1.5" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Tingkat XII : ${ssrInterpolate(getTahunAjaranNaik(selectedTahunAjaran.value?.tahun, 2))}
</th>

</tr>

<tr class="bg-gray-100 text-center font-bold" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<th class="border border-black p-1.5 w-[11%]" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Nilai Semester 1
</th>

<th class="border border-black p-1.5 w-[11%]" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Nilai Semester 2
</th>

<th class="border border-black p-1.5 w-[11%]" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Nilai Semester 3
</th>

<th class="border border-black p-1.5 w-[11%]" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Nilai Semester 4
</th>

<th class="border border-black p-1.5 w-[11%]" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Nilai Semester 5
</th>

<th class="border border-black p-1.5 w-[11%]" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Nilai Semester 6
</th>

</tr>

</thead>

<tbody data-v-5b5e4c74>

<!--[-->
`);
        ssrRenderList(mapelStruktur.value, (group, gIdx) =>
 {
          
_push(`
<!--[-->

<tr class="bg-gray-50/50" data-v-5b5e4c74>

<td colspan="7" class="border border-black p-1.5 font-bold uppercase" data-v-5b5e4c74>
${ssrInterpolate(group.group_name)}
</td>

</tr>

<!--[-->
`);
          ssrRenderList(group.mapels, (mapel, mIdx) =>
 {
            
_push(`
<tr data-v-5b5e4c74>

<td class="border border-black p-1.5 pl-4" data-v-5b5e4c74>
${ssrInterpolate(mapel)}
</td>

<td class="border border-black p-1.5 text-center" data-v-5b5e4c74>
${ssrInterpolate(nilaiSiswa.value[mapel] ? nilaiSiswa.value[mapel][1] : "")}
</td>

<td class="border border-black p-1.5 text-center" data-v-5b5e4c74>
${ssrInterpolate(nilaiSiswa.value[mapel] ? nilaiSiswa.value[mapel][2] : "")}
</td>

<td class="border border-black p-1.5 text-center" data-v-5b5e4c74>
${ssrInterpolate(nilaiSiswa.value[mapel] ? nilaiSiswa.value[mapel][3] : "")}
</td>

<td class="border border-black p-1.5 text-center" data-v-5b5e4c74>
${ssrInterpolate(nilaiSiswa.value[mapel] ? nilaiSiswa.value[mapel][4] : "")}
</td>

<td class="border border-black p-1.5 text-center" data-v-5b5e4c74>
${ssrInterpolate(nilaiSiswa.value[mapel] ? nilaiSiswa.value[mapel][5] : "")}
</td>

<td class="border border-black p-1.5 text-center" data-v-5b5e4c74>
${ssrInterpolate(nilaiSiswa.value[mapel] ? nilaiSiswa.value[mapel][6] : "")}
</td>

</tr>
`);
          
});
          
_push(`
<!--]-->

<!--]-->
`);
        
});
        
_push(`
<!--]-->
`);
        if (mapelStruktur.value.length === 0) {
          
_push(`
<tr data-v-5b5e4c74>

<td colspan="7" class="border border-black p-4 text-center text-slate-500 italic" data-v-5b5e4c74>
Data struktur mata pelajaran kosong atau sedang dimuat...
</td>

</tr>
`);
        } else {
          
_push(`
<!---->
`);
        }
        
_push(`
</tbody>

</table>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>

</div>
`);
      }
      
_push(`
</div>
`);
    };
  }
};
const _sfc_setup = _sfc_main.setup;
_sfc_main.setup = (props, ctx) =>
 {
  const ssrContext = useSSRContext();
  (ssrContext.modules || (ssrContext.modules = /* @__PURE__ */ new Set())).add("pages/admin/buku-induk.vue");
  return _sfc_setup ? _sfc_setup(props, ctx) : void 0;
};
const bukuInduk = /* @__PURE__ */ _export_sfc(_sfc_main, [["__scopeId", "data-v-5b5e4c74"]]);

export { bukuInduk as default };
//# sourceMappingURL=buku-induk-y4Ee287v.mjs.map
